title: Apapesch
compiled_truth: Apapesch is an external contact at [Isda](companies/isda). Over the corpus period (2000-11-13 to 2001-11-13), Apapesch sent 3 and received 46 emails, totalling 49 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark E Haedicke](people/mark-e-haedicke) (3), [Azam Mistry](people/azam-mistry-hsbc) (1), [Damian Kissane](people/damian-kissane-db) (1), [Genova Diane](people/genova-diane-jpmorgan) (1), [Douglas Bongartz-Renaud](people/douglas-bongartz-renaud-nl) (1).
